card.name: No Coming Back
card.text: When this enchantment enters, put a finality counter on each creature. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.) Each creature enters with an additional finality counter.

card.name: Make Your Dream Real
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has flying. Whenever enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Star of Predation
card.text: Destroy target land. Create a 20/20 green Horror Elemental creature token with vigilance and ward {20}. (Whenever that permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {20}.)

card.name: Endless Seas
Chirat, King of the Azure Seas
card.text: Flying You can't cast spells during extra turns. Baroque— Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {U} was spent to cast it, take an extra turn after this one. This ability only trigger once each turn, and only during your turn.

card.name: Sudden Redirection
card.text: Gain control of target triggered or activated ability. You may choose new target for it.

card.name: Penitent Sinner
card.text: Menace Whenever a player cast a spell that's one or more colors, they lose 1 life for each of this spell's colors.

card.name: Heartless Betrayal
card.text: Gain control of target creature with mana value X or less. Baroque— If at least five {U} was spent to cast this spell, create a token copy of that creature. If at least five {B} was spent to cast this spell, destroy up to one other target creature.

card.name: Mourning Combattant
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, it gains +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the amount of life you've lost this turn.

card.name: Glorious Slayer
card.text: Trample, reach Heroic -- Whenever you cast a spell that targets this creature, you may have its base power and toughness become X/X, where X is 1 plus the greatest toughness among creatures your opponents control.

card.name: Strategic Surrender
card.text: Enchant creature You control enchanted creature. Enchanted creature is a Citizen, loses all abilities, and can't attack or block. (It loses all other creature types.)

card.name: Bane of the Azure Seas
card.text: Ward—Tap a creature you control and put eight stun counter on it. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {U} was spent to cast it, choose up to eight. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Tap target nonland permanent you don't control • Put a stun counter on target nonland permanent.

card.name: Ayed, Weary Traveler
card.text: Vigilance Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell targeting this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each differently named lands you control.

card.name: Magic Circle: Drei
card.text: No two mana spent to cast this spell may be the same color. For each color of mana spent this way: • {W}: You gain 3 life. • {U}: Scry 3, then draw a card. • {B}: Each opponent loses 3 life. • {R}: Create three 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens. • {G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to three creatures you control.

card.name: Strategic Council
card.text: Exile the top X cards of your library. You may play one of those cards until the end of your next turn. Baroque — If at least five {R} was spent to cast this spell, spell cast this way may be cast without paying its mana cost. If at least five {U} was spent to cast this spell, put up to two cards exiled by this spell into your hand.

card.name: Dawngrove Unicorn
card.text: Vigilance Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {W} was spent to cast it, put two +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Ethelred, the Dealmaker
card.text: Ward—Discard six cards. At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws seven cards. If they do, they must discard seven cards at the beginning of the next end step. Whenever a creature you control attacks, it gets +X/+X, where X is the amount of cards in the defending player's hand.

card.name: Pay the Devil's Due
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter) I — Whenever a Pirate or Rogue creature you control deals combat damage to a player this turn, draw a card. II — If you have five or more cards in hand, create a 3/3 black Demon Rogue creature token with flying. III — Destroy all non-Demon creature tokens. Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Secret Blackmarket

card.name: Secret Blackmarket
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Pirate or Rogue. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {UB}{UB}{UB}, {T}: Exile this land, then return it on the battlefield (front face up). Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Pay the Devil's Due

card.name: Boundless Roads
card.text: {T}: Add {C} Channel — {X}{X}, Discard this card: Search your library for up to X basic lands that share a land type, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Ice Princess
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control. If you control an enchantment, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Steel Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance, reach (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap. This creature can block creatures with flying.) Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five mana of any color or {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Dreams of Peace
card.text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you. Whenever a player is dealt damage, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Dusk on the Battlefield
card.text: Destroy all non-Army creatures. Amass Soldiers X, where X is the amount of creatures destroyed this way. Each opponent amasses Soldier 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: Horizon Wanderer
card.text: This creature gets +2/+2 and has vigilance as long as you control eight or more lands. (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {G} was spent to cast it, search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Evergreen Canopy
Obnoxious Bard
card.text: Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell targeting this creature, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {R} was spent to cast it, you may have this creature's power and toughness become equal to the number of noncreature, nonland cards in your graveyard until end of turn.

card.name: Dream of Freedom
card.text: Spell you cast can't be countered. At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell this turn, sacrifice this enchantment and draw a card.

card.name: Song of the Forest
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains vigilance and trample until end of turn. Refrain 2 — {3}{G}{G} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it two times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Fated Vanguard
card.text: The first time this creature attacks each turn, if this creature has 4 power or more, it gains first strike until end of turn. The first time this creature attacks each turn, if this creature has 8 power or more, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase

card.name: Angelic Pity
card.text: Return target creature from your graveyard to the battlefield under your control. Baroque — If at least five {W} was spent to cast this spell, it gains indestructible until your next turn. If at least five {B} was spent to cast this spell, you gain life equal to that creature's mana value.

card.name: Bathin, Demon Mentor
card.text: Flying, trample, menace Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {B} was spent to cast it, you may search your library for a card and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Bottomless Chasm
Chromatic Storm
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to target creature. Baroque — If at least five {R} or {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast this spell, add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.

card.name: Misplaced Girl
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Creatures you control gains indestructible until end of turn. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {W} was spent to cast it while this creature is in your graveyard, amass Soldiers 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: Good Night's Rest
card.text: Tap target creature you control and put three stun counters and three +1/+1 counters on it. It has hexproof until it untap.

card.name: Traumatized Soldier
card.text: Whenever an opponent cast a spell, this creature deals 1 damage to you. Put a grudge counter on it. {1}{BR}{BR}: Transform this creature. If it has three or more grudge counter, draw a cards. You may only activate this ability once each turn. --- (Back): Ominous Knight

card.name: Ominous Knight
card.text: Menace, trample This creature gets +1/+1 for each grudge counter on it. --- (Front): Traumatized Soldier

card.name: Above the Clouds
card.text: Creatures you control with flying get +1/+1. {WU}{WU}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Exile all creatures with flying you control. Return those cards to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: The Bird's Flight
card.text: (The monarch draws a card at the beginning of their end step. Whenever the monarch is dealt combat damage by a creature, its controller becomes the monarch.) I — Put a flying counter on each Wizard or Noble creature you control. II — Create a Favorable Winds token. (It's a {1}{U} blue enchantment with "creatures you control with flying gets +1/+1) III — You become the monarch. Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Regal Pinnace

card.name: Regal Pinnace
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Noble or Wizard. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {WU}{WU}{WU}, {T}: Exile this land, then return it on the battlefield (front face up). Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): The Bird's Flight

card.name: Into Uneasy Paths
card.text: Target creature can't be block. If it is an equipped creature you control, it gets +2/+1 until end of turn instead. Refrain 4 — {3}{RW}{RW} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it four times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Army of the Verdant Woods
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land enters under your control, amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) Army creatures you control have trample.

card.name: Special Attack
card.text: Double target creature's power until end of turn. Refrain 2 — {6}{RG}{RG} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it two times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Dormant Monument
card.text: Trample This creature enters with a defender counter on it. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, remove a defender counter from this creature.

card.name: Final Breath
card.text: Destroy target creature at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Frontline Summoner
card.text: Haste Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {R} was spent to cast it, create two 3/1 red Elemental creature token with haste, "this creature can't block" and "at the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature".

card.name: Battlefield Standard
Xenophobia
card.text: Whenever a creature enters under an opponent's control, you lose 1 life and put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. Whenever a creature your opponent controls dies, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Veteran Swordmaster
card.text: First strike Whenever this creature attacks, look at the top five cards of your library. You may put a Equipment card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Stories of the Realm
card.text: Whenever this artifact enters, choose a color. Create a 1/1 Human creature token of the chosen color. Whenever you attack with three or more creatures sharing the same color, put a page counter on this artifact. {1}, Remove a page counter from this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: The Romance of Gules
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter) I — Create a 2/2 red and white Knight creature token. II — Create a Equipment artifact tokens with equip {1} and "equipped creature gets +1/+1". III — Knights and Warriors creatures you control gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Chivalrous Headquarter

card.name: Chivalrous Headquarter
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Knight or Warrior. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {RW}{RW}{RW}, {T}: Exile this land, then return it on the battlefield (front face up). Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): The Romance of Gules

card.name: Gear Up
card.text: Attach target equipment you control to target creature you control. Refrain X — {X}{RW}{RW} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it X times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Fated Duel
card.text: This spell cost {1} less if it target a creature with mana value five or greater. Target creature you control fight target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Keep Quiet
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If they do, players can't cast spells this turn.

card.name: Erratic Prophet
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Nithael, King of the Argent Field
card.text: Flying, double strike, vigilance, lifelink Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {W} was spent to cast it, double your life total.

card.name: Dream of Companionship
card.text: Creatures you control gets +1/+1. At the beginning of your end step, if you don't control any creatures, sacrifice this enchantment and draw a card.

card.name: Glimpse the True Self
card.text: Draw a card. Refrain 2 — {3}{U}{U} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it two times. )

card.name: Novice Channeler
card.text: This creature enters with a growth counter on it. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {G} was spent to cast it, put a growth counter on this creature. {T}: Add {G} for each growth counter on this creature.

card.name: Moment of Eternity
card.text: Life totals can't change until end of turn. (Players can't pay life)

card.name: Leading Vanguard
card.text: When this creature enters, amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on an Army creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Partner's Sword
card.text: When this Equipment enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token, then attach this to it. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 Equip {1} Refrain 1 — {3}{W}{W} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it one time. Copies become tokens.)

card.name: Border Patrol
card.text: Amass Soldiers X, where X is the number of differently named lands you control. (Put X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) Refrain 1 — {5}{G}{G} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it one time. )

card.name: Bladesinger's Dance
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Whenever this aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and ward {1}. Refrain 2 — {3}{WU}{WU} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it two times. Copies become tokens.)

card.name: Eternity Wanderer
card.text: This spell cost {X} less, where X is the greatest amount of cards in an opponent's hand. This creature gets -1/-1 for each cards in your hand. When this creature dies, draw two cards if an opponent has more cards in hands than you.

card.name: Crime of Passion
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/-2.

card.name: Dream of Curiosity
card.text: Whenever one or more creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card and you lose 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't draw two or more card this turn, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Skullface Infiltrator
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {U} was spent to cast it, you may have this creature become a copy of target creature, except it can't be blocked and it has this ability

card.name: Fall from Heaven
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter) I — Amass Clerics 1 (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Cleric. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Cleric Army creature token first.) II — You gain 1 life for each +1/+1 counter on Clerics and Angels you control. III — You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, exile target creature. Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Forbidden Paradise

card.name: Forbidden Paradise
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control an Angel or Cleric. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {WB}{WB}{WB}, {T}: Exile this land, then return it on the battlefield (front face up). Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Fall from Heaven

card.name: Lea, Wanderer of the Edge
card.text: Prowess Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may cast a copy of a spell you cast from anywhere but your hand or copied this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Predict the Future
card.text: Chose a card name. Until the end of your next turn, whenever a player cast a spell with the chosen name, copy it. You may choose new target for the copy. Refrain 2 — {3}{U}{U}{U} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it two times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Giant Riftguard
card.text: Reach, trample Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell targeting this creature, put a preparation counter on this creature. {T}, Remove a preparation counter from this creature: It fight target creature you don't control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Flanking Attack
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature. Amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: Grieving Wanderer
card.text: Whenever this creature enters, mill two cards. Then if there is a creature card in your graveyard, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Survivors of Battle
card.text: Amass Soldiers X, where X is the amount of creature cards in your graveyard. (Put X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: Outside the Realm of Possible
card.text: Exile a card you own from outside the game. You may cast it for as long as it is exiled. Refrain 3 — {5}{U}{U} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it three times. )

card.name: Torneach, Wandering Wizard
card.text: Flying, haste Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it, copy that spell. You may choose new target for the copy.

card.name: Sunrise Commander
card.text: When this creature enters, create a red and white 2/2 Knight creature token. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {W} was spent to cast it, put a +1/+1 counter on each creatures you control.

card.name: Chosen by the Sword
card.text: Search your library for an Equipment card and exile it. You may cast it from exile this turn. Whenever target creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, you may cast a card exiled with this spell without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Lore of the Past
card.text: Mill three cards. You may return a permanent card milled this way to your hand. Refrain 1 — {3}{BG}{BG} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it one time. )

card.name: Total Bisection
card.text: Each player lose half their life total, rounded up. Refrain 1 — {5}{B}{B} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it one time. )

card.name: Elven Clock
card.text: Whenever a player cast their twelfth spell each turn, exile this artifact, then end the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities, including this spell. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage heals and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

card.name: Samuel, Wandering Hero
card.text: Haste Other legendary creature you control have haste. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it and you control five legendary creatures, transform this creature. --- (Back): Samuel, Wandering Savior

card.name: Samuel, Wandering Savior
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, return target legendary creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it and you control ten legendary creatures, you win the game. --- (Front): Samuel, Wandering Hero

card.name: Pocket Dimension
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five mana of the chosen color or {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: War's Shadow
card.text: Menace This creature gets -X/-X, where X is your life total.

card.name: Firecharged Catapult
card.text: Reach, defender {T}: This creature deals 1 damage to target player. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {R} was spent to cast it, you may tap this creature, if you do, it deals 4 damage to target player.

card.name: Slumbering Predator
card.text: Trample Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {G} was spent to cast it, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Brychan, Wandering Druid
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it, for each non-Wolf creature token you control, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token.

card.name: Ellana, Wandering Hunter
card.text: Reach, deathtouch Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} was spent to cast it, destroy up to one target nonland permanent.

card.name: Army of the Argent Fields
card.text: Whenever you gain life, amass Soldiers 2. This ability only trigger once each turn. (To amass Soldiers 2, put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) Army creature you control have vigilance.

card.name: Manacharged Crystal
card.text: Once each turn, you may cast a spell with mana value 4 or less as though they cost {1} more. If you do so, draw a card. Once each turn, you may cast a spell with mana value 5 or more as though they cost {1} less.

card.name: Gules Ruby
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {R}{R}{R}, {T}: This artifact deals 3 damage to each opponent. Transform this artifact. --- (Back): Gules Peak

card.name: Gules Peak
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}{R}. --- (Front): Gules Ruby

card.name: Azure Sapphire
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. {U}{U}{U}, {T}: Draw two cards. Transform this artifact. --- (Back): Azure Sea

card.name: Azure Sea
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}{U}. --- (Front): Azure Sapphire

card.name: Verdant Emerald
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {G}{G}{G}, {T}: Target creature gets +4/+4 and gains trample until end of turn. Transform this artifact. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Verdant Wood

card.name: Verdant Wood
card.text: {T}: Add {G}{G}. --- (Front): Verdant Emerald

card.name: Diamond Dragon
card.text: Flying As this creature enters, choose a color. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen color, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Argent Pearl
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. {W}{W}{W}, {T}: Return target creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Transform this artifact. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Argent Field

card.name: Argent Field
card.text: {T}: Add {W}{W}. --- (Front): Argent Pearl

card.name: Platinum Golem
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) If you would lose the game, instead exile this creature and your life total becomes 1.

card.name: Sable Jet
card.text: {T}: Add {B}. {B}{B}{B}, {T}: Destroy target creature with mana value 2 or less. Transform this artifact. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Back): Sable Waste

card.name: Sable Waste
card.text: {T}: Add {B}{B}. --- (Front): Sable Jet

card.name: Prison Warden
card.text: Whenever this creature enters, exile another target creature until it leaves the battlefield. Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {W} was spent to cast it, exile another target creature until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Torneach's Choice
card.text: Choose X: • Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new target for the copy. • Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. • Switch the power and toughness of each of up to two target creatures until end of turn.

card.name: Sudden Invasion
card.text: This spell costs {1} less for each creature that attacked this turn. Draw two cards. Amass Soldiers 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)

card.name: The Beginning of the End
card.text: As long as you have 5 or less life, this spell costs {3} less to cast. If a source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Sanguine Predator
card.text: Flying, lifelink Ward—Pay 3 life and Sanguine Predator's controller gain 3 life Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {B} was spent to cast it, target creature you don't control gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Savior's Blade
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. It gains first strike until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {1}

card.name: Soulcapture Shield
Caller of the Flock
card.text: Flying Whenever an enchantment enters under your control, create a 1/1 white Bird token creature with flying.

card.name: Honor the Fallen
card.text: Exile up to two cards in any graveyard. Amass Soldiers 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) Refrain X — {X}{WB}{WB} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it X times. )

card.name: Reinforcment General
card.text: First strike Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, amass Soldiers X, where X is the mana value of that creature. (Put X +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.) Whenever a token creature you control dies, you gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Early Risers
card.text: Create three tapped 1/1 white and green Human tokens.

card.name: Four of a Kindred
card.text: Flying, haste Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {R} was spent to cast it, create three token that are copy of this creature, expect they have "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature".

card.name: Through Patches of Violet
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains "Whenever this creature attacks, it can't be blocked this turn unless defending player discards a card." Refrain X — {X}{UB}{UB} (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it X times. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Central, Grand Capital
card.text: As this land enters, choose a basic land type. It has this land type. This land enters tapped. Grandeur — Discard a card named Central, Grand Capital: Search your library for a basic land sharing a land type with this land, reveal it, put it into your hand then shuffle. Scry 1.

card.name: Solar Dispersal
card.text: This spell cost {1} less to cast for each Plains you control. Exile target creature with mana value X or less.

card.name: Mercenary Warlord
card.text: Haste Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell targeting this creature, create a 1/1 red Human creature token. It gain haste until end of turn. Whenever this creature attacks, creature tokens you control get +X/+X, where X is this creature's power.

card.name: Wandering Spring
card.text: Reach, trample, vigilance Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, reveal the top card of your library. You may pay {1} to cast this card without paying its mana coast. If you don't put, it into your hand

card.name: Robotic Reveal
card.text: Target creature becomes an artifact Robot in addition to its other type. (This effect lasts indefinitely.) Create X token copies of that creature, except they are Robot artifact in addition to its other type. Those tokens gain haste until end of turn. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Secret Message
card.text: Hideaway 5 (When this artifact enters, look at the top five cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) Equipped creature has vigilance and ward {2}. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {U}{U}{U} and sacrifice this artifact. If you do, cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost. Equip {1}

card.name: Drain Dry
card.text: Destroy target creature or enchantment. Baroque — Whenever you cast this spell, if at least five {B} was spent to cast it, you gain life equal to that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Dark Interstice
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose 1 life for each of this card's colors.

card.name: Demon-blessed Warlock
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if they have more cards in hand than you, draw a card. Otherwise, exile the top card of that player's library. You may play the exiled card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

card.name: Spiritual Guardian
card.text: Flying Whenever an artifact or enchantment you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Bloody Charge
card.text: Target creature gain haste until end of turn. Draw a card. Refrain 1 — {2}{R}, Discard a card (If you cast this spell for its refrain cost, copy it one time. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Reborn in Battle
card.text: Whenever you lose life during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. This ability triggers only thrice each turn. Whenever a creature you control dies, this enchantment deals damage to each opponent equal to the amount of +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Elder of the Forest
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a age counter on this creature. Whenever this creature dies or you cast a spell with mana value 5 or more, create an X/X green Beast creature token, where X is the amount of age counter on this creature.

card.name: Ancient Ringmaker
card.text: Reach Baroque — Whenever you cast another spell, if at least five {G} was spent to cast it, create a Sol Ring token. (It's an {1} colorless artifact with "{T}: Add {C}{C}")
